name: AltEnergy Acquisition Corp
business: AltEnergy Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed to effect a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar transaction with one or more businesses. The company has not engaged in any operations nor generated any revenue to date.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: Our amended and restated certificate of incorporation provides that we must complete our initial business combination on or prior to May 1, 2026 (unless such date is further extended by an amendment to the Company s Certificate of Incorporation).
